creator: ouaissa@int-evry.fr
text:
We would like to build a firewall server (TIS). So, we want to know if the confiuration below will be supported by de BSD Release 3.0

- Pentium II 350 Mhz

- SDRAM 128 Mo PC100

- intel motherboard t440bx
 The full carateristics of this motherboard are:
 - SCSI card Symbios Logic 53c875JBE Ultra Wide connector (40Mb/sec)
 - Graphics card Cirrus Logic GD 5480
 - Network Adapter Intel 82558 EtherExpress Pro+ 10/100Mps

- Network Adapter Intel EtherExpress Pro/100+ Server

- Hard Disk Seagate Ultra Wide 4.5Go 7200T

Thanks to respond.

KARIM
Agedis
